prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类（含理科）最低位次分别为 43034→38920→36203→31436→44695，2021–2024 年呈持续前移趋势（位次数字减小），但 2025 年因陕西高考改革（理科→物理类）及选科要求变化，最低位次大幅后移至 44695 名，近 2 年波动幅度约 13259 名，2025 年基准约 44695 名；该校在陕西物理类（含理科）招生计划：2021 年 58 人、2022 年 70 人、2023 年 70 人、2024 年 80 人、2025 年 92 人，持续扩招；2026 年计划 107 人，较 2025 年增加 15 人（+16.3%），扩招幅度明显，竞争压力有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；校本部（中国石油大学（北京））软科主榜 2026 年约第 62 名，近年排名稳定在 48–62 区间，学校层次定位清晰；该校在声誉舆情、抖音热度及投档异常文件中均无显著记录，说明近年报考关注度平稳，未见明显正面或负面舆情冲击；校本部石油与天然气工程为 A+ 学科（第五轮学科评估），化学工程与技术、地质资源与地质工程等为优势学科；克拉玛依校区共享校本部学科资源，石油工程、油气储运工程、资源勘查工程等专业与优势学科 高度关联。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信等专业社会热度持续偏高（2024–2026 年均为高热推荐/推荐），石油工程等传统工科热度平稳；陕西省 2026 年物理类考生约 206500 人，较 2025 年（172468 人）增加约 34032 人（+19.7%），考生规模显著扩大，竞争加剧；学校位于新疆克拉玛依市，距陕西较远，属跨省远距离就读；该校在陕西招生占比约 0.9%–1.4%（2021–2025 年），非主要生源省份，地域偏好对报考热度影响中性偏弱。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 44695、2026 年大幅扩招 16.3%（缓解竞争）与陕西物理类考生增加 19.7%（加剧竞争）的双向作用，供需弹性计算得出基准位次约 49066 名；考虑考生规模增幅大于计划增幅，竞争净加剧，叠加学校层次稳定、专业热度分化等因素，预测最低位次约 49266 名，区间 48766–49766 名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 48766–49766 名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<48766）可重点冲刺计算机类、人工智能、石油工程等一档王牌专业；位次接近区间 上限（>49766）建议以三档专业保底，优先选择化学工程与工艺、安全工程等传统工科。该校物理类 2026 年大幅扩招至 107 人，录取机会较往年明显增加。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were 43034→38920→36203→31436→44695 respectively. From 2021 to 2024, there was a continuous forward trend (decreasing ranking numbers), but in 2025, due to the Shaanxi college entrance examination reform (Science→Physics Category) and changes in subject selection requirements, the minimum ranking significantly shifted backward to 44695. The fluctuation range in the past two years is about 13259 places, with the 2025 baseline around 44695. The university's enrollment plan in Shaanxi for Physics Category (including Science): 58 in 2021, 70 in 2022, 70 in 2023, 80 in 2024, 92 in 2025, showing continuous expansion. The 2026 plan is 107, an increase of 15 (+16.3%) compared to 2025, with a significant expansion rate, easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; the main campus (China University of Petroleum (Beijing)) ranks around 62nd on the Soft Science main list in 2026, with stable rankings in the 48–62 range in recent years, clearly positioning the university level. The university has no significant records in reputation public opinion, Douyin popularity, or abnormal admission files, indicating stable attention in recent years without notable positive or negative public opinion shocks. The main campus's Petroleum and Natural Gas Engineering is an A+ discipline (fifth round of discipline evaluation), with Chemical Engineering and Technology, Geological Resources and Geological Engineering as advantageous disciplines. The Karamay Campus shares the main campus's disciplinary resources, with majors such as Petroleum Engineering, Oil and Gas Storage and Transportation Engineering, and Resource Exploration Engineering highly correlated with advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors like Computer Science, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communication have consistently high social popularity (highly recommended/recommended from 2024 to 2026), while traditional engineering majors like Petroleum Engineering have stable popularity. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Shaanxi is about 206,500, an increase of about 34,032 (+19.7%) compared to 2025 (172,468), significantly expanding the examinee pool and intensifying competition. The university is located in Karamay, Xinjiang, far from Shaanxi, requiring long-distance cross-province study. The university's enrollment proportion in Shaanxi is about 0.9%–1.4% (2021–2025), not a major source province, with regional preference having a neutral to weak impact on application popularity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 44695, the significant 16.3% enrollment expansion in 2026 (easing competition), and the 19.7% increase in Shaanxi Physics Category examinees (intensifying competition), the supply-demand elasticity calculation yields a baseline ranking of about 49066. Considering that the examinee pool growth rate exceeds the plan growth rate, net competition intensifies, coupled with stable university level and differentiated major popularity, the predicted minimum ranking is about 49266, with a range of 48766–49766.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 48766–49766, it is recommended to mainly apply for Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<48766), you can focus on aiming for top Tier 1 majors like Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, and Petroleum Engineering. If your ranking is near the upper limit (>49766), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors as safety, prioritizing traditional engineering majors like Chemical Engineering and Technology, Safety Engineering. The university's Physics Category enrollment in 2026 has significantly expanded to 107, increasing admission opportunities compared to previous years.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including Liberal Arts) were 8761→7637→6837→7319→6937, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers), with continuous increases from 2021 to 2023, a slight decline in 2024, and recovery to 6937 in 2025. The fluctuation range over the past 5 years is about 1924 places, with a 2025 baseline of approximately 6937. The university's enrollment plan in Shaanxi for History Category (including Liberal Arts): 15 in 2021, 14 in 2022, 16 in 2023, 16 in 2024, 13 in 2025; 14 in 2026, an increase of 1 (+7.7%) compared to 2025, a slight expansion.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; the main campus ranks approximately 62nd in the 2026 Soft Science Ranking, with a clear positioning. The university has no significant records in reputation public opinion, Douyin popularity, or abnormal application files, indicating stable application attention. The main campus has A+ in Petroleum and Natural Gas Engineering, but the History Category majors (Accounting, Chinese Language and Literature, Ideological and Political Education, Economics, Russian) have low correlation with the main campus's advantageous engineering disciplines, with weak disciplinary support.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Accounting/Financial Management social popularity is recommended (2024), Chinese Language and Literature/Chinese is recommended, Ideological and Political Education/Teacher Training is divided and wait-and-see. In 2026, the number of History Category examinees in Shaanxi is about 88,500, an increase of about 12,859 (+17.0%) compared to 2025 (75,641), significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition. The university is located in Karamay, Xinjiang, far from Shaanxi; the number of History Category enrollments in Shaanxi is small (13–16), and regional preference has a neutral to weak impact on application enthusiasm.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the bidirectional effects of the 2025 baseline ranking of 6937, a slight enrollment expansion of 7.7% in 2026 (easing competition), and a 17.0% increase in Shaanxi History Category examinees (intensifying competition), the supply-demand elasticity calculation yields a baseline ranking of approximately 7257. Given that the increase in examinees is significantly greater than the increase in enrollment, resulting in net intensified competition, combined with factors such as the low correlation between liberal arts majors and the university's engineering strengths, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 7307, with a range of 6807–7807.
